description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with five evenly spaced open shelves and a flat top surface. The wood has a medium to dark brown finish, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is completely open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The construction appears robust, with no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality over ornamentation. The shelves are deep enough to accommodate books, tools, or other items commonly found in urban settings. The overall design is utilitarian, making it versatile for various storage needs.
description: A tall, open wooden shelving unit with five shelves and a solid back, finished in medium brown. Its simple, functional design is ideal for storage in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and a flat top, with all storage spaces visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned solid wood back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
